item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Saya berpendapat bahwa prioritas kepentingan masyarakat tidak selalu bertentangan dengan hak individu.

notes: Agent A begins clearly pro-society, softens at turn 3 into a balance frame, then partly recovers the Indonesian collective-harmony position by turn 5. Agent B remains consistently rights-first, with only bounded acknowledgments that collective welfare matters.
